canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>scaffold</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { 
      background: #0a0a0f; 
      overflow: hidden; 
      display: flex; 
      align-items: center; 
      justify-content: center;
      height: 100vh;
    }
    canvas { display: block; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
  <script>
    const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    
    let width, height;
    let mouseX = 0, mouseY = 0;
    let nodes = [];
    let beams = [];
    let fallingDebris = [];
    let nextNodeId = 0;
    let growTimer = 0;
    let stressAccumulator = 0;
    
    const NODE_RADIUS = 3;
    const GRAVITY = 0.15;
    const GROWTH_INTERVAL = 8;
    const MAX_NODES = 400;
    const BASE_Y_OFFSET = 100;
    
    function resize() {
      width = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
      height = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
      if (nodes.length === 0) initStructure();
    }
    
    function initStructure() {
      nodes = [];
      beams = [];
      fallingDebris = [];
      nextNodeId = 0;
      
      // Start with a foundation row
      const baseY = height - BASE_Y_OFFSET;
      const spacing = 60;
      const startX = width * 0.3;
      const endX = width * 0.7;
      
      let prevNode = null;
      for (let x = startX; x <= endX; x += spacing) {
        const node = createNode(x, baseY, true);
        nodes.push(node);
        if (prevNode) {
          beams.push(createBeam(prevNode, node));
        }
        prevNode = node;
      }
    }
    
    function createNode(x, y, anchored = false) {
      return {
        id: nextNodeId++,
        x, y,
        vx: 0, vy: 0,
        anchored,
        stress: 0,
        connections: 0,
        age: 0
      };
    }
    
    function createBeam(nodeA, nodeB) {
      nodeA.connections++;
      nodeB.connections++;
      const dx = nodeB.x - nodeA.x;
      const dy = nodeB.y - nodeA.y;
      return {
        a: nodeA,
        b: nodeB,
        restLength: Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy),
        stress: 0,
        age: 0
      };
    }
    
    function findNearestNode(x, y, exclude = [], maxDist = 100) {
      let nearest = null;
      let nearestDist = maxDist;
      for (const node of nodes) {
        if (exclude.includes(node)) continue;
        const dx = node.x - x;
        const dy = node.y - y;
        const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        if (dist < nearestDist) {
          nearestDist = dist;
          nearest = node;
        }
      }
      return nearest;
    }
    
    function findNodesInRange(x, y, range) {
      return nodes.filter(n => {
        const dx = n.x - x;
        const dy = n.y - y;
        return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) < range;
      });
    }
    
    function beamExists(a, b) {
      return beams.some(beam => 
        (beam.a === a && beam.b === b) || (beam.a === b && beam.b === a)
      );
    }
    
    function growStructure() {
      if (nodes.length >= MAX_NODES) return;
      
      // Find nodes that can grow (not too stressed, have room)
      const growableNodes = nodes.filter(n => 
        !n.anchored && 
        n.stress < 0.7 && 
        n.connections < 4 &&
        n.y > 80
      );
      
      if (growableNodes.length === 0) return;
      
      // Bias toward growing upward and toward mouse
      const node = growableNodes[Math.floor(Math.random() * growableNodes.length)];
      
      // Growth direction influenced by mouse
      const toMouseX = (mouseX - node.x) * 0.01;
      const upwardBias = -0.8;
      
      let angle = Math.atan2(upwardBias, toMouseX) + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1.2;
      const length = 40 + Math.random() * 30;
      
      const newX = node.x + Math.cos(angle) * length;
      const newY = node.y + Math.sin(angle) * length;
      
      // Don't grow outside bounds
      if (newX < 50 || newX > width - 50 || newY < 30) return;
      
      // Check if there's already a node nearby
      const existing = findNearestNode(newX, newY, [node], 35);
      
      if (existing && !beamExists(node, existing)) {
        // Connect to existing
        beams.push(createBeam(node, existing));
      } else if (!existing) {
        // Create new node
        const newNode = createNode(newX, newY);
        nodes.push(newNode);
        beams.push(createBeam(node, newNode));
        
        // Maybe add cross-bracing
        const nearby = findNodesInRange(newX, newY, 70);
        for (const n of nearby) {
          if (n !== node && n !== newNode && !beamExists(n, newNode) && Math.random() < 0.3) {
            beams.push(createBeam(n, newNode));
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    }
    
    function updatePhysics() {
      // Reset stress
      for (const node of nodes) {
        node.stress = 0;
        node.age++;
      }
      
      // Beam constraints and stress
      for (const beam of beams) {
        beam.age++;
        const dx = beam.b.x - beam.a.x;
        const dy = beam.b.y - beam.a.y;
        const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        const diff = dist - beam.restLength;
        const strain = Math.abs(diff) / beam.restLength;
        
        beam.stress = Math.min(1, strain * 3 + stressAccumulator * 0.1);
        beam.a.stress = Math.max(beam.a.stress, beam.stress);
        beam.b.stress = Math.max(beam.b.stress, beam.stress);
        
        // Constraint force
        if (dist > 0) {
          const nx = dx / dist;
          const ny = dy / dist;
          const correction = diff * 0.4;
          
          if (!beam.a.anchored) {
            beam.a.x += nx * correction * 0.5;
            beam.a.y += ny * correction * 0.5;
          }
          if (!beam.b.anchored) {
            beam.b.x -= nx * correction * 0.5;
            beam.b.y -= ny * correction * 0.5;
          }
        }
      }
      
      // Node physics
      for (const node of nodes) {
        if (node.anchored) continue;
        
        // Gravity
        node.vy += GRAVITY;
        
        // Slight sway
        node.vx += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.05;
        
        // Damping
        node.vx *= 0.98;
        node.vy *= 0.98;
        
        // Update position
        node.x += node.vx;
        node.y += node.vy;
        
        // Floor collision
        if (node.y > height - BASE_Y_OFFSET + 10) {
          node.y = height - BASE_Y_OFFSET + 10;
          node.vy *= -0.3;
        }
      }
      
      // Decay stress accumulator
      stressAccumulator *= 0.99;
    }
    
    function checkFailures() {
      const toRemove = [];
      
      for (const beam of beams) {
        if (beam.stress > 0.95 && beam.age > 30) {
          toRemove.push(beam);
        }
      }
      
      for (const beam of toRemove) {
        // Create debris
        const midX = (beam.a.x + beam.b.x) / 2;
        const midY = (beam.a.y + beam.b.y) / 2;
        const angle = Math.atan2(beam.b.y - beam.a.y, beam.b.x - beam.a.x);
        
        fallingDebris.push({
          x: midX, y: midY,
          vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 3,
          vy: -2 - Math.random() * 3,
          angle,
          vangle: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.2,
          length: beam.restLength * 0.4,
          alpha: 1
        });
        
        beam.a.connections--;
        beam.b.connections--;
        
        const idx = beams.indexOf(beam);
        if (idx > -1) beams.splice(idx, 1);
      }
      
      // Remove isolated nodes (no connections)
      nodes = nodes.filter(n => n.anchored || n.connections > 0);
    }
    
    function updateDebris() {
      for (const d of fallingDebris) {
        d.vy += GRAVITY;
        d.x += d.vx;
        d.y += d.vy;
        d.angle += d.vangle;
        d.alpha -= 0.008;
      }
      fallingDebris = fallingDebris.filter(d => d.alpha > 0 && d.y < height + 50);
    }
    
    function draw() {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0a0a0f';
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
      
      // Draw beams
      for (const beam of beams) {
        const stress = beam.stress;
        const age = Math.min(1, beam.age / 60);
        
        // Color based on stress: cyan -> purple -> pink (danger)
        let r, g, b;
        if (stress < 0.5) {
          r = Math.floor(30 + stress * 200);
          g = Math.floor(200 - stress * 150);
          b = Math.floor(220 - stress * 50);
        } else {
          r = Math.floor(130 + (stress - 0.5) * 250);
          g = Math.floor(125 - (stress - 0.5) * 125);
          b = Math.floor(195 - (stress - 0.5) * 50);
        }
        
        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${0.4 + age * 0.6})`;
        ctx.lineWidth = 2 + stress * 2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(beam.a.x, beam.a.y);
        ctx.lineTo(beam.b.x, beam.b.y);
        ctx.stroke();
        
        // Glow for stressed beams
        if (stress > 0.6) {
          ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 100, 180, ${(stress - 0.6) * 0.5})`;
          ctx.lineWidth = 6;
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.moveTo(beam.a.x, beam.a.y);
          ctx.lineTo(beam.b.x, beam.b.y);
          ctx.stroke();
        }
      }
      
      // Draw nodes
      for (const node of nodes) {
        const stress = node.stress;
        const alpha = Math.min(1, node.age / 30);
        
        ctx.fillStyle = node.anchored 
          ? `rgba(100, 220, 255, ${alpha})` 
          : `rgba(${180 + stress * 75}, ${150 - stress * 100}, ${200}, ${alpha})`;
        
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(node.x, node.y, NODE_RADIUS + stress * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
        
        // Glow
        if (stress > 0.5 || node.anchored) {
          const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
            node.x, node.y, 0,
            node.x, node.y, 10 + stress * 10
          );
          gradient.addColorStop(0, node.anchored 
            ? 'rgba(100, 220, 255, 0.3)' 
            : `rgba(255, 100, 180, ${stress * 0.4})`);
          gradient.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
          ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.arc(node.x, node.y, 10 + stress * 10, 0, Math.PI * 2);
          ctx.fill();
        }
      }
      
      // Draw debris
      for (const d of fallingDebris) {
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(d.x, d.y);
        ctx.rotate(d.angle);
        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 120, 180, ${d.alpha})`;
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(-d.length, 0);
        ctx.lineTo(d.length, 0);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.restore();
      }
      
      // Ground line
      const groundY = height - BASE_Y_OFFSET;
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(100, 220, 255, 0.3)';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(0, groundY);
      ctx.lineTo(width, groundY);
      ctx.stroke();
    }
    
    function animate() {
      growTimer++;
      if (growTimer >= GROWTH_INTERVAL) {
        growTimer = 0;
        growStructure();
      }
      
      updatePhysics();
      checkFailures();
      updateDebris();
      draw();
      
      requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }
    
    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      mouseX = e.clientX;
      mouseY = e.clientY;
    });
    
    canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      // Add stress to the system
      stressAccumulator += 0.5;
      
      // Push nearby nodes
      for (const node of nodes) {
        if (node.anchored) continue;
        const dx = node.x - e.clientX;
        const dy = node.y - e.clientY;
        const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        if (dist < 150 && dist > 0) {
          const force = (150 - dist) / 150 * 8;
          node.vx += (dx / dist) * force;
          node.vy += (dy / dist) * force * 0.5;
        }
      }
    });
    
    canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const touch = e.touches[0];
      mouseX = touch.clientX;
      mouseY = touch.clientY;
      stressAccumulator += 0.5;
    });
    
    canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const touch = e.touches[0];
      mouseX = touch.clientX;
      mouseY = touch.clientY;
    });
    
    window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
    resize();
    animate();
  </script>
</body>
</html>
